description: Style Note Let only transform your everyday attire to fun, colourful and stylish! We're super excited in the myntra office to be selling these flattering tops and dresses from the quirky, flirty, denim brand ONLY. It's easy to look both cute and trendy when you're wearing anything from this summery collection. Product Details Green top, has a mandarin collar with a top button, half buttoned placket, inverted V pleat below the placket, short sleeves, gathers below the neckline at the back, loops on the waist for a belt and black adjustable belt with a tang clasp Material and Care 100% viscose Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
